verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filiis Aaron hæ partitiones erant. Filii Aaron : Nadab, et Abiu, et Eleazar, et Ithamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֥י אַהֲרֹ֖ן מַחְלְקוֹתָ֑ם בְּנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֔ן נָדָב֙ וַאֲבִיה֔וּא אֶלְעָזָ֖ר וְאִיתָמָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now these were the divisions of the sons of Aaron: The sons of Aaron: Nadab, and Abiu, and Eleazar, and Ithamar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta tämä oli Aaronin lasten järjestys: Aaronin pojat oli: Nadab, Abihu, Eleasar ja Itamar.
verses.king_james: Now these are the divisions of the sons of Aaron. The sons of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortui sunt autem Nadab et Abiu ante patrem suum absque liberis : sacerdotioque functus est Eleazar, et Ithamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨מׇת נָדָ֤ב וַֽאֲבִיהוּא֙ לִפְנֵ֣י אֲבִיהֶ֔ם וּבָנִ֖ים לֹא־הָי֣וּ לָהֶ֑ם וַֽיְכַהֲנ֔וּ אֶלְעָזָ֖ר וְאִיתָמָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Nadab and Abiu died before their father, and had no children: so Eleazar, and Ithamar did the office of the priesthood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Nadab ja Abihu kuolivat isänsä edessä, ja ei heillä ollut lasta. Ja Eleasar ja Itamar tulivat papeiksi.
verses.king_james: But Nadab and Abihu died before their father, and had no children: therefore Eleazar and Ithamar executed the priest’s office.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et divisit eos David, id est, Sadoc de filiis Eleazari, et Ahimelech de filiis Ithamar, secundum vices suas et ministerium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּחָלְקֵ֣ם דָּוִ֔יד וְצָדוֹק֙ מִן־בְּנֵ֣י אֶלְעָזָ֔ר וַאֲחִימֶ֖לֶךְ מִן־בְּנֵ֣י אִיתָמָ֑ר לִפְקֻדָּתָ֖ם בַּעֲבֹדָתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David distributed them, that is, Sadoc of the sons of Eleazar, and Ahimelech of the sons of Ithamar, according to their courses and ministry.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David määräsi heitä näin: Zadokin Eleasarin lapsista ja Ahimelekin Itamarin lapsista, heidän virkansa jälkeen heidän palveluksessansa.
verses.king_james: And David distributed them, both Zadok of the sons of Eleazar, and Ahimelech of the sons of Ithamar, according to their offices in their service.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inventique sunt multo plures filii Eleazar in principibus viris, quam filii Ithamar. Divisit autem eis, hoc est, filiis Eleazar, principes per familias sedecim : et filiis Ithamar per familias et domos suas octo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמָּצְא֣וּ בְֽנֵי־אֶלְעָזָ֡ר רַבִּ֞ים לְרָאשֵׁ֧י הַגְּבָרִ֛ים מִן־בְּנֵ֥י אִיתָמָ֖ר וַֽיַּחְלְק֑וּם לִבְנֵ֨י אֶלְעָזָ֜ר רָאשִׁ֤ים לְבֵית־אָבוֹת֙ שִׁשָּׁ֣ה עָשָׂ֔ר וְלִבְנֵ֧י אִיתָמָ֛ר לְבֵ֥ית אֲבוֹתָ֖ם שְׁמוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were found many more of the sons of Eleazar among the principal men, than of the sons of Ithamar. And he divided them so, that there were of the sons of Eleazar, sixteen chief men by their families: and of the sons of Ithamar eight by their families and houses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja usiammat väkevät päämiehet löydettiin Eleasarin kuin Itamarin lapsista, koska he heitä niin määräsivät: Eleasarin lapsista oli siellä kuusitoistakymmentä ylimmäistä heidän isäinsä huoneessa, ja kahdeksan Itamarin lapsista, heidän isäinsä huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And there were more chief men found of the sons of Eleazar than of the sons of Ithamar; and thus were they divided. Among the sons of Eleazar there were sixteen chief men of the house of their fathers, and eight among the sons of Ithamar according to the house of their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro divisit utrasque inter se familias sortibus : erant enim principes sanctuarii, et principes Dei, tam de filiis Eleazar quam de filiis Ithamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּחְלְק֥וּם בְּגוֹרָל֖וֹת אֵ֣לֶּה עִם־אֵ֑לֶּה כִּֽי־הָי֤וּ שָׂרֵי־קֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ וְשָׂרֵ֣י הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים מִבְּנֵ֥י אֶלְעָזָ֖ר וּבִבְנֵ֥י אִיתָמָֽר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he divided both the families one with the other by lot: for there were princes of the sanctuary, and princes of God, both of the sons of Eleazar, and of the sons of Ithamar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he määräsivät heitä arvalla sekä näitä että niitä; sillä molemmat Eleasarin ja Itamarin lapset olivat päämiehet pyhässä ja päämiehet Jumalan edessä.
verses.king_james: Thus were they divided by lot, one sort with another; for the governors of the sanctuary, and governors of the house of God, were of the sons of Eleazar, and of the sons of Ithamar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descripsitque eos Semeias filius Nathanaël scriba Levites, coram rege et principibus, et Sadoc sacerdote, et Ahimelech filio Abiathar, principibus quoque familiarum sacerdotalium, et Leviticarum : unam domum, quæ ceteris præerat, Eleazar : et alteram domum, quæ sub se habebat ceteros, Ithamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּכְתְּבֵ֡ם שְֽׁמַעְיָה֩ בֶן־נְתַנְאֵ֨ל הַסּוֹפֵ֜ר מִן־הַלֵּוִ֗י לִפְנֵ֨י הַמֶּ֤לֶךְ וְהַשָּׂרִים֙ וְצָד֣וֹק הַכֹּהֵ֗ן וַאֲחִימֶ֙לֶךְ֙ בֶּן־אֶבְיָתָ֔ר וְרָאשֵׁי֙ הָאָב֔וֹת לַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְלַלְוִיִּ֑ם בֵּֽית־אָ֣ב אֶחָ֗ד אָחֻז֙ לְאֶלְעָזָ֔ר וְאָחֻ֥ז ׀ אָחֻ֖ז לְאִיתָמָֽר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Semeias the son of Nathanael the scribe a Levite, wrote them down before the king and the princes, and Sadoc the priest, and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, and the princes also of the priestly and Levitical families: one house, which was over the rest, of Eleazar: and another house, which had the rest under it, of Ithamar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Semaja kirjoittaja, Netaneelin poika Leviläisistä, kirjoitti heidät kuninkaan edessä, ja päämiesten ja papin Zadokin, ja Ahimelekin Abjatarin pojan, ja pappein ja Leviläisten, ja ylimmäisten isäin edessä: yksi isän huone otettiin Eleasarin edestä ja toinen otettiin sitte Itamarin edestä.
verses.king_james: And Shemaiah the son of Nethaneel the scribe, one of the Levites, wrote them before the king, and the princes, and Zadok the priest, and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, and before the chief of the fathers of the priests and Levites: one principal household being taken for Eleazar, and one taken for Ithamar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exivit autem sors prima Jojarib, secunda Jedei,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֞א הַגּוֹרָ֤ל הָֽרִאשׁוֹן֙ לִיה֣וֹיָרִ֔יב {ס} לִידַֽעְיָ֖ה הַשֵּׁנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now the first lot came forth to Joiarib, the second to Jedei,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ensimäinen arpa lankesi Jojaribin päälle, toinen Jedatjan,
verses.king_james: Now the first lot came forth to Jehoiarib, the second to Jedaiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: tertia Harim, quarta Seorim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְחָרִם֙ הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י {ס} לִשְׂעֹרִ֖ים הָרְבִעִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The third to Harim, the fourth to Seorim,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmas Harimin, neljäs Seorimin,
verses.king_james: The third to Harim, the fourth to Seorim,

verses.latin_vulgate: quinta Melchia, sexta Maiman,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַלְכִּיָּה֙ הַחֲמִישִׁ֔י {ס} לְמִיָּמִ֖ן הַשִּׁשִּֽׁי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fifth to Melchia, the sixth to Maiman,
verses.finnish_biblia: Viides Malkian, kuudes Mijamin,
verses.king_james: The fifth to Malchijah, the sixth to Mijamin,

verses.latin_vulgate: septima Accos, octava Abia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהַקּוֹץ֙ הַשְּׁבִעִ֔י {ס} לַאֲבִיָּ֖ה הַשְּׁמִינִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The seventh to Accos, the eighth to Abia,
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemäs Hakkotsin, kahdeksas Abian,
verses.king_james: The seventh to Hakkoz, the eighth to Abijah,

verses.latin_vulgate: nona Jesua, decima Sechenia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְיֵשׁ֙וּעַ֙ הַתְּשִׁעִ֔י {ס} לִשְׁכַנְיָ֖הוּ הָעֲשִׂרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The ninth to Jesua, the tenth to Sechenia,
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhdeksäs Jesuan, kymmenes Sekanian,
verses.king_james: The ninth to Jeshua, the tenth to Shecaniah,

verses.latin_vulgate: undecima Eliasib, duodecima Jacim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְאֶלְיָשִׁיב֙ עַשְׁתֵּ֣י עָשָׂ֔ר {ס} לְיָקִ֖ים שְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The eleventh to Eliasib, the twelfth to Jacim,
verses.finnish_biblia: Yksitoistakymmenes Eliasibin, kaksitoistakymmenes Jakimin,
verses.king_james: The eleventh to Eliashib, the twelfth to Jakim,

verses.latin_vulgate: tertiadecima Hoppha, decimaquarta Isbaab,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְחֻפָּה֙ שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה עָשָׂ֔ר {ס} לְיֶשֶׁבְאָ֖ב אַרְבָּעָ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The thirteenth to Hoppha, the fourteenth to Isbaab,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmastoistakymmenes Huppan, neljästoistakymmenes Jesebabin,
verses.king_james: The thirteenth to Huppah, the fourteenth to Jeshebeab,

verses.latin_vulgate: decimaquinta Belga, decimasexta Emmer,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְבִלְגָּה֙ חֲמִשָּׁ֣ה עָשָׂ֔ר {ס} לְאִמֵּ֖ר שִׁשָּׁ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fifteenth to Belga, the sixteenth to Emmer,
verses.finnish_biblia: Viidestoistakymmenes Bilgan, kuudestoistakymmenes Immerin,
verses.king_james: The fifteenth to Bilgah, the sixteenth to Immer,

verses.latin_vulgate: decimaseptima Hezir, decimaoctava Aphses,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְחֵזִיר֙ שִׁבְעָ֣ה עָשָׂ֔ר {ס} לְהַפִּצֵּ֖ץ שְׁמוֹנָ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The seventeenth to Hezir, the eighteenth to Aphses,
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemästoistakymmenes Hesirin, kahdeksastoistakymmenes Happitsetsin,
verses.king_james: The seventeenth to Hezir, the eighteenth to Aphses,

verses.latin_vulgate: decimanona Pheteia, vigesima Hezechiel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִֽפְתַחְיָה֙ תִּשְׁעָ֣ה עָשָׂ֔ר {ס} לִֽיחֶזְקֵ֖אל הָעֶשְׂרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The nineteenth to Pheteia, the twentieth to Hezechiel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhdeksästoistakymmenes Petahian, kahdeskymmenes Jeheskelin,
verses.king_james: The nineteenth to Pethahiah, the twentieth to Jehezekel,

verses.latin_vulgate: vigesima prima Jachin, vigesima secunda Gamul,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְיָכִין֙ אֶחָ֣ד וְעֶשְׂרִ֔ים {ס} לְגָמ֖וּל שְׁנַ֥יִם וְעֶשְׂרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The one and twentieth to Jachin, the two and twentieth to Gamul,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäinenkolmattakymmentä Jakinin, toinenkolmattakymmentä Gamulin,
verses.king_james: The one and twentieth to Jachin, the two and twentieth to Gamul,

verses.latin_vulgate: vigesima tertia Dalaiau, vigesima quarta Maaziau.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִדְלָיָ֙הוּ֙ שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֔ים {ס} לְמַעַזְיָ֖הוּ אַרְבָּעָ֥ה וְעֶשְׂרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The three and twentieth to Dalaiau, the four and twentieth to Maaziau.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmaskolmattakymmentä Delajan, neljäskolmattakymmentä Maasian.
verses.king_james: The three and twentieth to Delaiah, the four and twentieth to Maaziah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ vices eorum secundum ministeria sua, ut ingrediantur domum Domini, et juxta ritum suum sub manu Aaron patris eorum, sicut præceperat Dominus Deus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה פְקֻדָּתָ֞ם לַעֲבֹדָתָ֗ם לָב֤וֹא לְבֵית־יְהֹוָה֙ כְּמִשְׁפָּטָ֔ם בְּיַ֖ד אַהֲרֹ֣ן אֲבִיהֶ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוָּ֔הוּ יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: These are their courses according to their ministries, to come into the house of the Lord, and according to their manner under the hand of Aaron their father: as the Lord the God of Israel had commanded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on heidän järjestyksensä heidän virkansa jälkeen, menemään Herran huoneesen tapansa jälkeen, isänsä Aaronin käden alla; niinkuin Herra Israelin Jumala heidän oli käskenyt.
verses.king_james: These were the orderings of them in their service to come into the house of the Lord, according to their manner, under Aaron their father, as the Lord God of Israel had commanded him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filiorum Levi qui reliqui fuerant, de filiis Amram erat Subaël, et de filiis Subaël, Jehedeia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֥י לֵוִ֖י הַנּוֹתָרִ֑ים לִבְנֵ֤י עַמְרָם֙ שֽׁוּבָאֵ֔ל לִבְנֵ֥י שׁוּבָאֵ֖ל יֶחְדְּיָֽהוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now of the rest of the sons of Levi, there was of the sons of Amram, Subael: and of the sons of Subael, Jehedeia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Muiden Levin lasten seassa oli Amramin lapsista Subael, Subaelin lapsista Jehdeja.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the sons of Levi were these: Of the sons of Amram; Shubael: of the sons of Shubael; Jehdeiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis quoque Rohobiæ, princeps Jesias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִרְחַבְיָ֑הוּ לִבְנֵ֣י רְחַבְיָ֔הוּ הָרֹ֖אשׁ יִשִּׁיָּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Also of the sons of Rohobia the chief Jesias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rehabian lapsista: Jissia oli heistä ensimäinen.
verses.king_james: Concerning Rehabiah: of the sons of Rehabiah, the first was Isshiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Isaari vero filius Salemoth, filiusque Salemoth Jahath :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַיִּצְהָרִ֣י שְׁלֹמ֔וֹת לִבְנֵ֥י שְׁלֹמ֖וֹת יָֽחַת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the son of Isaar Salemoth, and the son of Salemoth Jahath:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Jitseharilaisista oli Selomot, Selomotin lapsista Jahat.
verses.king_james: Of the Izharites; Shelomoth: of the sons of Shelomoth; Jahath.

verses.latin_vulgate: filiusque ejus Jeriau primus, Amarias secundus, Jahaziel tertius, Jecmaan quartus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנָ֖י יְרִיָּ֑הוּ אֲמַרְיָ֙הוּ֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י יַחֲזִיאֵל֙ הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י יְקַמְעָ֖ם הָרְבִיעִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And his son Jeriau the first, Amarias the second, Jahaziel the third, Jecmaan the fourth.
verses.finnish_biblia: (Hebronin lapset) Jerija ensimäinen, Amaria toinen, Jahasiel kolmas, Jekameam neljäs.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Hebron; Jeriah the first, Amariah the second, Jahaziel the third, Jekameam the fourth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius Oziel, Micha : filius Micha, Samir.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֤י עֻזִּיאֵל֙ מִיכָ֔ה לִבְנֵ֥י מִיכָ֖ה (שמור) [שָׁמִֽיר]׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of Oziel, Micha: the son of Micha, Samir.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ussielin lapset: Miika. Miikan lapsista Samir.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Uzziel; Michah: of the sons of Michah; Shamir.

verses.latin_vulgate: Frater Micha, Jesia : filiusque Jesiæ, Zacharias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲחִ֤י מִיכָה֙ יִשִּׁיָּ֔ה {ס} לִבְנֵ֥י יִשִּׁיָּ֖ה זְכַרְיָֽהוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The brother of Micha, Jesia: and the son of Jesia, Zacharias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jesija oli Miikan veli; Jesijan lapsista Sakaria.
verses.king_james: The brother of Michah was Isshiah: of the sons of Isshiah; Zechariah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Merari : Moholi, et Musi. Filius Oziau : Benno.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֤י מְרָרִי֙ מַחְלִ֣י וּמוּשִׁ֔י {ס} בְּנֵ֖י יַעֲזִיָּ֥הוּ בְנֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Merari: Moholi and Musi: the son of Oziau: Benno.
verses.finnish_biblia: Merarin lapset: Maheli ja Musi; Jaesijan hänen poikansa lapset.
verses.king_james: The sons of Merari were Mahli and Mushi: the sons of Jaaziah; Beno.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius quoque Merari : Oziau, et Soam, et Zachur, et Hebri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י מְרָרִ֑י לְיַעֲזִיָּ֣הוּ בְנ֔וֹ וְשֹׁ֥הַם וְזַכּ֖וּר וְעִבְרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The son also of Merari Oziau, and Soam, and Zacchur, and Hebri.
verses.finnish_biblia: Merarin lapset Jaesijasta, hänen poikansa oli Soham, Sakkur ja Ibri.
verses.king_james: The sons of Merari by Jaaziah; Beno, and Shoham, and Zaccur, and Ibri.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Moholi filius, Eleazar, qui non habebat liberos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַחְלִי֙ אֶלְעָזָ֔ר וְלֹא־הָ֥יָה ל֖וֹ בָּנִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the son of Moholi: Eleazar, who had no sons.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Mahelilla oli Eleasar, ja hänellä ei ollut yhtään poikaa.
verses.king_james: Of Mahli came Eleazar, who had no sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius vero Cis, Jerameel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְקִ֖ישׁ בְּנֵי־קִ֥ישׁ יְרַחְמְאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the son of Cis, Jeramael.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kisistä, Kisin lapset: Jerahmeel.
verses.king_james: Concerning Kish: the son of Kish was Jerahmeel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Musi : Moholi, Eder et Jerimoth : isti filii Levi secundum domos familiarum suarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י מוּשִׁ֔י מַחְלִ֥י וְעֵ֖דֶר וִירִימ֑וֹת אֵ֛לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י הַלְוִיִּ֖ם לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Musi: Moholi, Eder, and Jerimoth. These are the sons of Levi according to the houses of their families.
verses.finnish_biblia: Musin lapset: Maheli, Eder ja Jeremot. Ne ovat Leviläisten lapset heidän isäinsä huoneen jälkeen.
verses.king_james: The sons also of Mushi; Mahli, and Eder, and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites after the house of their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miseruntque et ipsi sortes contra fratres suos filios Aaron coram David rege, et Sadoc, et Ahimelech, et principibus familiarum sacerdotalium et Leviticarum, tam majores quam minores : omnes sors æqualiter dividebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּפִּ֩ילוּ֩ גַם־הֵ֨ם גּוֹרָל֜וֹת לְעֻמַּ֣ת ׀ אֲחֵיהֶ֣ם בְּנֵי־אַהֲרֹ֗ן לִפְנֵ֨י דָוִ֤יד הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ וְצָד֣וֹק וַאֲחִימֶ֔לֶךְ וְרָאשֵׁי֙ הָאָב֔וֹת לַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְלַלְוִיִּ֑ם אָב֣וֹת הָרֹ֔אשׁ לְעֻמַּ֖ת אָחִ֥יו הַקָּטָֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they also cast lots over against their brethren the sons of Aaron before David the king, and Sadoc, and Ahimelech, and the princes of the priestly and Levitical families, both the elder and the younger. The lot divided all equally.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät myös heittivät arpaa veljeinsä Aaronin lasten kanssa kuningas Davidin edessä, ja Zadokin ja Ahimelekin, ja ylimmäisten isäin edessä, pappein ja Leviläisten seassa; ylimmäinen isäin seassa pienimmänkin veljensä kanssa.
verses.king_james: These likewise cast lots over against their brethren the sons of Aaron in the presence of David the king, and Zadok, and Ahimelech, and the chief of the fathers of the priests and Levites, even the principal fathers over against their younger brethren.
